title: sonchus phoeniciformis
intro: Sonchus phoeniciformis, also known as the Phoenician thistle or Phoenicic lettuce, is a species of thistle in the sunflower family (Asteraceae) that is native to China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sonchus phoeniciformis include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or decoction, and its leaves and stems are also used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, tinctures, and capsules.
